name: Golf Envy Frisco
about: Golf Envy Frisco is an indoor golf simulator facility offering a private, membership-based experience focused on playing and practicing around a busy schedule. The venue is equipped with Golfzon TwoVision NX simulators, powered by Unreal Engine 5.x, which provide lifelike experiences on hundreds of renowned courses like Pebble Beach. Members can access the facility 24 hours a day in a climate-controlled environment, and receive detailed swing analytics, including spin rate and flight path, to help improve their game. The facility emphasizes a country club atmosphere, requiring appointments for tee times and offering opportunities for social events, private tournaments, and group outings.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to hundreds of world-class golf courses including Pebble Beach
24/7 climate-controlled environment for play regardless of weather
Advanced swing analytics including spin rate and flight path for game improvement

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of food service available onsite.

simulator_hardware.notes: Powered by Unreal Engine 5.x with an upgraded Motion Plate for immersive play.
